event: View of the Alhambra in Granada
description: A watercolor sketch of the Court of the Lions at the Alhambra in Granada. Ornate Moorish pavilions with colorful tiled domes and slender columns frame a courtyard. A figure in a red dress stands in the foreground near stone lion sculptures. The palette is warm with sunlit yellows, pinks, reds, and blues rendered in loose, transparent washes. Text in the lower right corner identifies the location.
